summary:
Perfect! The test passes now. The issue was in the offset calculation for pagination. The original code was subtracting 1 from the offset when `page > 1`, which caused the pagination to skip items. I removed that incorrect subtraction, and now the pagination works correctly.

The fix was simple - the offset should just be `(page - 1) * per_page` without any additional adjustments. This ensures that:
- Page 1 starts at offset 0 (items 0-9)
- Page 2 starts at offset 10 (items 10-19)
- And so on...
